events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess described field condition. Scenario: Progress photos for Standard work execution show current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference: site standard work, TWI. Stage rough-complete. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since checkpoint scope finished, remaining visible work is cleanup/labeling/follow-on finish outside scored checkpoint. No defects flagged. So decision likely pass. Risk low. Work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 90? value 0. component_conditions empty. confidence high 0.9. findings maybe none. actions maybe none or schedule closeout. rationale: checkpoint scope complete per standard work/TWI; residual items are non-scored finish/cleanup. references site standard work, TWI. Need include all fields. sound_source, event_time, rate, order, workable maybe empty. Ensure valid JSON.
